content:
# Harbor Enterprise Business Checking Terms

## Account Profile
Harbor Enterprise Business Checking is a Northstar Bank business deposit account with account type business_checking. It is designed as a non-interest product: interest bearing is False. The account is earnings allowance eligible: True. Use this guide only for Harbor Enterprise Business Checking; see "Business Checking Product Comparison" when the customer is comparing it with another business checking account.

## Opening and Monthly Cost
1. The minimum opening deposit is 25.
2. The monthly fee is 75.
3. A minimum daily balance waiver is not specified.
4. A combined deposit balance waiver is not specified.
5. Premium personal relationship waiver eligibility is False.

## Linked Accounts
Harbor Enterprise Business Checking includes 5 linked accounts. Additional linked accounts carry an additional linked account fee of 30. See "Internal: Enterprise Business Checking Fee Rules" for employee handling of linked-account fee assessment.

## Transaction Band
The monthly transaction band maximum for this product is not specified. If a customer asks about limits or comparisons outside these listed terms, use the relevant comparison or fee-waiver article rather than estimating a missing threshold.
title: Harbor Enterprise Business Checking Terms
